title: mellow springy kjøttkaker bake
description: Norwegian-inspired dish featuring springy meatballs, apricot jam, and nimono-simmer. A crowd-pleaser for all occasions.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: substituted with 2 flax eggs in egg-free version

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine ground beef, flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, and eggs in a large bowl.
Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Add chopped onion, apricot jam, water, and nimono seasoning. Mix until just combined.
Place meatballs on the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each meatball.
Roll the meatballs gently in bread crumbs to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven for 18-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm with your favorite sides, such as mashed potatoes or steamed vegetables.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
Reheat in the oven or microwave until warmed through.
